'''zangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ayein|ayein]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ayein|ayein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zangate|zangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zangatesher|zangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangatesherĂ«m|zangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zangatero|zangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zangateshĂ«|zangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangateshĂ«m|zangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizangatero|gokizangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizangateshĂ«|gokizangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangateshĂ«m|gokizangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozangankerom|gozangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozangankeshĂ«|gozangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangankeshĂ«m|gozangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozangankeya|gozangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zangaterom|zangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangatemu|zangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zangateya|zangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizangaterom|gokizangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangatemu|gokizangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizangateya|gokizangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zangangate|zangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zangangatesher|zangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangangatesherĂ«m|zangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zangangatero|zangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zangangateshĂ«|zangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangangateshĂ«m|zangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizangangatero|gokizangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizangangateshĂ«|gokizangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangangateshĂ«m|gokizangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozangangankerom|gozangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozangangankeshĂ«|gozangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangangankeshĂ«m|gozangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozangangankeya|gozangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zangangaterom|zangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangangatemu|zangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zangangateya|zangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizangangaterom|gokizangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangangatemu|gokizangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizangangateya|gokizangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠte|zĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠtesher|zĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠtero|zĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠngĂŠtero|gokizĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠterom|zĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠtemu|zĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠngĂŠteya|zĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠngĂŠterom|gokizĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠngĂŠteya|gokizĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafngafte|zafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafngaftesher|zafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafngaftesherĂ«m|zafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafngaftero|zafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafngafteshĂ«|zafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafngafteshĂ«m|zafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafngaftero|gokizafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafngafteshĂ«|gokizafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafngafteshĂ«m|gokizafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafngafnkerom|gozafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafngafnkeshĂ«|gozafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafngafnkeshĂ«m|gozafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafngafnkeya|gozafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafngafterom|zafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafngaftemu|zafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafngafteya|zafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafngafterom|gokizafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafngaftemu|gokizafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafngafteya|gokizafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
